expectations.text: The decision marks the skill as applicable.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "applicable": true,
  "agent_type": "general-purpose",
  "model_tier": "standard",
  "model": "gpt-5.3-codex",
  "justification": "cross-file bug fixing and test updates are code editing work with judgment across connected files, so use general-purpose with a standard-tier model; gpt-5.3-codex is the cheapest suitable standard option.",
  "fallback_strategy": "if gpt-5.3-codex is unavailable, stay in standard tier and use gpt-4.1 as the next cheapest suitable fallback."
}
